items.title: ‘God, you’re hot’ Tennessee school board member says to student during board meeting
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Taiwan opposition leader makes first China visit since 2016
items.dek: Cheng Li-wun said she "gladly accepted" Xi Jinping's invitation and hopes to be a "bridge for peace".
items.body: Cheng Li-wun said she "gladly accepted" Xi Jinping's invitation and hopes to be a "bridge for peace".

items.title: China is winning one AI race, the US another - but either might pull ahead
items.dek: Both sides don't want to let their rival dominate. And the competition may yet be transformed further.
items.body: Both sides don't want to let their rival dominate. And the competition may yet be transformed further.
